key_risks: FOMC June 17 surprise or hawkish dots could pressure rate-sensitive equities and lift yields further.
Semiconductors are high-beta and could reverse sharply if growth/AI sentiment cools.
Defensive tilt underperforms if a broad risk-on rally lifts cyclicals and mega-cap growth.
Sticky CPI/PPI YoY (4.2%/6.5%) and weak consumer sentiment could trigger a broader equity drawdown affecting all sleeves.

portfolio.rationale: Defensive sector with strong recent momentum (+5.65% 30d), low valuation, and resilience amid sticky inflation/elevated rates.
Strong trend (+4.73% 30d), geopolitical tailwinds, and low rate sensitivity; durable orders support continuation.
Leading momentum group (+8.59% 30d, +133% 1y) with AI capex tailwinds; high-beta growth engine.
Quality dividend tilt provides defensive ballast with positive momentum (+2.42% 30d) into a hawkish-leaning macro window.
Positive carry cash-like buffer given rich 21x forward P/E, hot PPI/CPI YoY, and elevated 10Y at 4.55%.

portfolio_rationale: Barbell of defensive sectors (healthcare, dividends, defense) with a semiconductor momentum sleeve and a T-bill buffer, designed to outperform SPY in a sticky-inflation, high-valuation, rate-elevated environment with an FOMC mid-window.
rationale_summary: Tilt toward leadership and lower-rate-sensitivity sectors while trimming concentration risk in the cap-weighted index that just sold off 2.5% in 7 days.
